mainText:
Welcome to Bank of Entitlement! Where you can overdraft your account without consequences. Because, let's be honest, you deserve it.

Visit Bank of Entitlement dot com for more.

ENTITLEMENT STORY: So there I was, strolling into my favorite caf, feeling like the king of entitlement. I confidently ordered my usual artisanal double-shot latte, smirking at the barista like I owned the place. When it came time to pay, I casually reached for my wallet, only to realize it wasn't there. Panic set in momentarily-I couldn't possibly be expected to pay for my own coffee like some peasant!I took a deep breath, looked the barista straight in the eye, and with a dramatic flair, declared, "I refuse to suffer such indignity! As the illustrious Hot Josh, I demand that you comp my latte as compensation for this inconvenience." The barista, clearly taken aback by my audacity, hesitated for a moment before nodding and offering to cover the cost.With a smug grin, I sipped my free latte, basking in the sweet taste of entitlement and victory. Who needs a wallet when you have charm, confidence, and a healthy dose of entitlement? Just another day in the life of Hot Josh.
